# Emoji Heavy Document EMOJIMARKER 🎉

🚀🔥💡🌟🦀📚🧠⚡🎯🌍🎨🍕🐉🌈☀️🌙⭐🎵🎮🏆

This paragraph mixes 😀 emoji with the searchable word RUSTACEAN_TOKEN and
some Chinese 中文检索 so a non-emoji token in the same doc stays findable.

🇯🇵🇰🇷🇨🇳🇸🇦 flag emoji (multi-codepoint ZWJ sequences) 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 family emoji
and skin-tone modifiers 👍🏽👋🏿 to stress the tokenizer's grapheme handling.

End marker FINAL_EMOJI_TOKEN ✅
